_comment: SHIP SYSTEM CARDS - Equippable ship components (weapons, hulls, engines, computers, paints). Loaded by CardBuilder.java -> ShipSystemCard.java. Fields: Level/MaxLevel (upgrade range), nextShipSystemCardGuid (next upgrade tier, 0=none), SlotType (weapon/hull/engine/computer from ShipSlotType.java), Tier, ShipObjectKeyRestrictions (limit to specific ship models, empty=fits all), ShipRoleRestrictions (limit to ship roles), SkillHashes/shipAbilityCards (attached skills), StaticBuffs/MultiplyBuffs (ObjectStats: flat and % stat bonuses), Durability (HP of the component itself), Class (Standart or Elite from ShipSystemClass.java), Views (StatView.java enum array for UI display), Unique/ReplaceableOnly/Trashable/Indestructible. CRITICAL: GUIDs 226 (colonial paint) and 227 (cylon paint) are hardcoded in ShopProtocol.setupEventShop() lines 192-193. Without them, login crashes!
